Justinian II, First Reign (AD 685-695). AV tremissis (15mm, 1.45 gm, 7h). NGC AU 4/5 - 2/5, wrinkled, marks. Constantinople, AD 692-695. IhS CRIStDS RЄX-RЄϚNANtIЧM, half-length bust of Christ
sales.description:
Ancients
Justinian II, First Reign (AD 685-695). AV tremissis (15mm, 1.45 gm, 7h). NGC AU 4/5 - 2/5, wrinkled, marks. Constantinople, AD 692-695. IhS CRIStDS RЄX-RЄϚNANtIЧM, half-length bust of Christ facing, with long hair and full beard, wearing pallium and colobium, cross behind head, right hand raised in benediction, book of Gospels cradled in left / D IЧStINI-AN-ЧS SERЧ CHRIStI, full-length figure of Justinian II standing facing, wearing loros and crown surmounted by cross, long cross pot...

sales.title:
Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 40282 — JUSTINIAN II with TIBERIUS. Second Reign, 705-711. AV Tremissis (1.37 gms), Constantinople Mint. NGC MS, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 2/5. Wavy Flan, Clipped, Glue Residue.

sales.description:
JUSTINIAN II with TIBERIUS. Second Reign, 705-711. AV Tremissis (1.37 gms), Constantinople Mint. NGC MS, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 2/5. Wavy Flan, Clipped, Glue Residue.
To view all items from the John P. Burnham Collection, click  here.
S-1420. Obverse: Facing bust of Christ Pantokrator; Reverse: Crowned and facing busts of Justinian and Tiberius, wearing chlamys and holding cross potent without steps between them. Uncommon as a type, with bold details, a bright luster, and good appeal, despite so...
